form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Last start 4th of 14 at Nakayama Dirt on March 7 over 1800m, 4 len behind Mars Odyssey carrying 58.0kg at $3.80. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 15 at Kyoto Dirt on January 24 over 1900m, long-neck behind Ask Stein carrying 57.0kg at $5.30. Placed 2/2 here and is overdue for a win. Take catching.

Can turn things around.
